attributes.action: Return Misused Taxpayer Money & End Public Funding of the British Monarchy
attributes.additional_details:
•	A full independent investigation into royal use of taxpayer money.
•	Disclosure of all financial records involving public funds.
•	Repayment of any misused taxpayer money to the British people.
•	An end to public funding for royals involved in corruption or misconduct.
•	A public vote on dissolving the monarchy and transitioning to an accountable alternative.
The British people deserve their money back, full transparency, and a system that serves the public — not private privilege.
attributes.background: We call on the UK Government and Parliament to investigate, recover, and return any taxpayer money misused by members of the British royal family, and to end public funding of the monarchy where it no longer serves the public interest.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petitions, which call for similar action:

Launch a public inquiry into how taxpayers fund the monarchy
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762368

Withdraw all public funding for the Royal Family
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/761703
